docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARCIA, DELIA AS TO DEFENDANT LEIVA, ANA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
